seo.title: Contact | Krisada.com
seo.description: Start a real conversation about building online, content systems, AI visibility, or digital life. I read these personally.

hero.title: Start with the real objective.
hero.subheadline: If you have a serious conversation about building online, AI visibility, or digital systems ... this is the right place to start.
hero.intro: I read these personally. Clear context gets a faster answer than a vague ask. Tell me what you are building, where things are stuck, and what a useful outcome looks like.

fit.title: Good fit
items: Students and builders learning how digital systems actually work.
People building websites, content libraries, or AI-visible authority sites.
Partners with a real collaboration, media, or teaching angle.

not_fit.title: Not for
items: Generic service pitches sent to 50 inboxes.
Vague requests with no clear objective.
Low-context messages that expect a high-effort answer.

form.transition: Tell me what you are actually trying to do. Clear beats polished.
form.intro: A few specifics help separate real conversations from inbox noise.
form.submit_note: If this is a generic pitch, this is probably the wrong form.
form.success_message: Message received. If the fit is real, you will hear back at the email you provided.
form.error_message: A few things need fixing before the message can go through.
